title: Horse Armor & Stuff
description: A resouce pack that remakes the horse armor textures of Actions & Stuff and brings them to Minecraft: Java Edition
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5b0228c1f038b3a9c63721bdf08994cbeb5a4b9.png)
# About
**Horse Armors & Stuff** is an Java Edition recreation of the original [Action & Stuff](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/oreville-studios/actions--stuff-1.4/61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795) horse armor textures, bringing the stylized Bedrock aesthetic to your Java gameplay

**This resource pack requires the _Entity Model Features_ and _Entity Texture Features_ mods (EMF), updated to their latest versions.**

# Disclaimer
All textures featured in this resource pack are fan-made recreations based on the visual style of the original Action & Stuff pack by Oreville Studios.
ect is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Mojang, Microsoft, or Oreville Studios in any way.
recreated assets were designed from scratch to replicate the style and feel of the original Bedrock Edition content for Java Edition players.
